The Pigsty

Opening the dev app at http://127.0.0.1:5173…

Run npm run dev from the repo root first (port 5173 must be free). Open this file from the repo folder so the logo loads.

If the next page fails to load, try http://127.0.0.1:5173/ or http://127.0.0.1:5173/ (same server; use one URL consistently for cookies).
